recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist makes multiple trips through time to save a woman that was murdered by her brutal husband.

recommendations.overview: An aspiring painter meets various characters and learns valuable lessons while traveling across America.

recommendations.overview: A young linguist named Milo Thatch joins an intrepid group of explorers to find the mysterious lost continent of Atlantis.

recommendations.title: Kung Fury

recommendations.title: The Visitor from the Future
recommendations.overview: In a devastated future, the apocalypse threatens the Earth. The last hope lies with a man capable of time travel. His mission: to return to the past and change the course of events. But the time police hunts him down in every era. A race against time

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
recommendations.overview: Two gangsters and the woman they love try to survive the most dangerous night of their lives. As if that wasn’t enough, there’s one wild ingredient added to the mix: a time machine.

recommendations.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force Colon Movie Film for Theaters
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Action, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: An action epic that explores the origins of the Aqua Teen Hunger Force (better known as Master Shake, Frylock, and Meatwad,) who somehow become pitted in a battle over an immortal piece of exercise equipment.
